title: TurnOPD: Making On-Policy Distillation Turn-Aware for Efficient Long-Horizon Agent Training
innovation_summary: TurnOPD: Making On-Policy Distillation Turn-Aware for Efficient Long-Horizon Agent Training: We identify two key inefficiencies in vanilla agent OPD: (1) full-horizon rollouts often waste wall-clock resources on tail turns that provide weak and noisy KL supervision,.
